rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees referencing ports, implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings
For output dependency guarantees, relate visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Ensure AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool; align helper declaration types with expression types
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Avoid unsafe Boolean data range comparisons unless the port is explicitly an AGREE bool in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), implication =>
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not generate range assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible relations
